name: Scanly
summary: The application source code for Scanly is distributed under AGPL-3.0-only.

name: Ultralytics YOLO document-corner model
summary: The corner detector is based on a YOLO11n pose model trained for document corner detection. Review the upstream model licensing terms before distributing derivatives.

name: AndroidX, Jetpack Compose, CameraX, Room, Hilt
summary: These libraries provide the Android UI, storage, dependency injection, and camera foundations used by the app.

name: LiteRT runtime
summary: LiteRT powers the on-device document corner inference path used during live detection and validation.

name: Google Play In-App Update Library
summary: Provides Google Play in-app update checks and install flows for production releases.
license: Play Core Software Development Kit Terms of Service

name: PdfBox-Android
summary: Android port of Apache PDFBox used to apply password protection to generated PDF exports.

name: Kotlinx Serialization
summary: Provides the versioned JSON format used by the recoverable shared Scanly library.
